basics.name: Mark L F Tlau
basics.title: Automation Specialist & Systems Programmer
basics.bio: I specialize in tackling complex data extraction challenges and writing performant, low-level binaries. From bypassing advanced anti-bot measures in Python to writing pure C network daemons and Go CLI tools.

expertise.title: Advanced Web Scraping
expertise.description: Bypassing aggressive anti-bot measures (Cloudflare, JS challenges, CAPTCHAs) by reverse-engineering obfuscated JavaScript.

expertise.title: Low-Level Programming
expertise.description: Writing lightweight, memory-safe C/C++ and Go applications to handle raw socket communication, APIs, and system utilities.

experience.description: Engineering bespoke data extraction and automation pipelines, bypassing advanced anti-bot measures to deliver clean, structured data for clients.

Spearheaded a major process improvement initiative by developing a comprehensive, macro-driven Excel VBA application to automate the generation of 1,100+ unique student report cards, reducing manual processing time by over 95%.

projects.title: Advanced Anti-Bot Scraping System
projects.description: Engineered a sophisticated Python scraper utilizing DrissionPage to bypass Cloudflare and CAPTCHAs. Reverse-engineered obfuscated JS to decrypt data sources, achieving a 99.8% extraction success rate for 2M+ records.

projects.title: WhatsGo CLI Client
projects.description: Developed a command-line WhatsApp client in Go, demonstrating expertise in building concurrent, networked applications and interacting with external APIs.

projects.title: C/C++ Project Suite & twitch_c
projects.description: Developed a diverse suite of applications including a memory-safe Twitch chatbot (sockets/IRC), a Google Maps Data Extractor, and classic games demonstrating a strong grasp of C/C++ fundamentals.

education.degree: Post Graduate Diploma in Computer Applications (PGDCA)
